description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, featuring a prominent front porch with a tiled floor and multiple large windows along the facade. The exterior walls are finished in white, and the windows and doors are framed in a light wood tone, providing a modern yet inviting appearance. The interior layout is visible, showing several rooms, including a living area with a fireplace, bedrooms, and a kitchen, all separated by partition walls. The roof is flat, and the structure is elevated slightly above the ground, with the porch extending along one side. The rear and side elevations have fewer windows, emphasizing privacy, while the front is open and accessible. Decorative elements such as wall art and furniture are visible through the windows, adding to the residential character.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a large tiled front porch, multiple large windows, and a flat roof. The layout is open and inviting, with visible interior rooms and wood-framed doors and windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide tiled porch, three large windows, and the main entrance, highlighting the open and welcoming facade.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the living area with a fireplace, a portion of the porch, and fewer windows, emphasizing the interior layout.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows and doors, focusing on privacy and the solid white exterior walls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue back door, additional rooms, and the extension of the porch along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
